---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

Describe the feature in 1-2 sentences.

## Why

What's the use case? Who benefits?

## Where it fits

- [ ] Core (everyone needs this — should be in `starter/`)
- [ ] Example variant (specialized — should go in `examples/`)
- [ ] Documentation (manual, docs, or comments)
- [ ] Tooling (build, deploy, dev experience)
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Concrete proposal

If you have an idea of how it could be implemented, sketch it here. Pseudocode, file paths, sketches all welcome. If you don't, that's fine — leave this empty.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is this one best?

## Are you willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I'd need guidance
- [ ] No, just suggesting
